name: Rosemont
blurbEn: Rosemont station anchors one of Montreal's most family-friendly and rapidly appreciating neighbourhoods. Rosemont–La Petite-Patrie has seen consistent price growth fueled by its strong community character, parks, local markets, and excellent transit. Triplexes are the dominant property type, attracting owner-occupants and investors alike. Prices remain more accessible than the Plateau while offering comparable quality of life.
blurbFr: La station Rosemont ancre l'un des quartiers les plus familiaux et à l'appréciation la plus rapide de Montréal. Rosemont–La Petite-Patrie a connu une croissance constante des prix alimentée par son caractère communautaire fort, ses parcs, marchés locaux et excellent transport.
